titleStmt.title: SII 22.293: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 293. (A.R. No. 293 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, WALAJAPET TALUK, TIRUMĀLPURAM. MAṆIKAṆṬHĒŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. RĀJARĀJA I—15th YEAR (A.D. 999-1000).

summary.p: This has the introduction Tirumagaḷ pōla etc. It records an agreement given by the Ūrār of Tirumālpēṟu to measure out a specified quantity of paddy to the temple once every year for the 15(1/2) kaḻañju of gold received by them from the latter.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumakaḷpolap perunilaccelviyum taṉakke yurimai pūṇṭamai maṉakkoḷak kān=taḷūrcālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi veṅkaināṭuṅ kaṅkapāṭiyum nuḷampapāṭiyum taṭikaipāṭiyum kuṭamalaināṭun taṇṭāṟkoṇṭa taṉṉeḻil Ūḻi yūḻiyuḷḷellā yāṇṭun toḻuteka viḷaṅkum yāṇṭeyteḻiya
raittecukoḷk korājarājarājakecaripanmaṟku yāṇṭu 10 5Āvatu tāmark koṭṭattu vallanāṭṭut tirumālpeṟṟu Ūrom kaiyyeḻuttu Ikkoṭṭattu Iṉṉāṭṭu Ivvūrt tirumālpeṟṟu tribhuvaṉacaṇṭeśvarar pakkal yāṅkaḷ koṇṭu kaṭava poṉ tanmakaṭṭaḷait tuḷainiṟai
patiṉayṅkaḻañcarai poṉ koṇṭu kaṭavom Ippoṉ patiṉayṅkaḻañ caraiyuṅ koṇṭa paricāvatu kaḻañciṉvāy Ūrakattuniṉṟār nārāyakkāloṭokku marakkālāl kaḻañciṉvāy mukkāṭimukkālāka yirupatteṇkāṭināṉāḻiyum Āṇṭuvarai paṅkuṉiyuñ cit
tiraiyum paṭappanāramum patarum vāluṅ kuttalum puḻutiyum nikki Uṭaiyār tirumuṟṟattuk koṇṭu ceṉṟu Aḷantu tevakanmikaḷvacam taravu koḷvomāṉom tirumālpeṟṟu Āṭṭāṇṭutoṟum can=tirātit taval Aḷa
ppom Itaṟṟiṟampil dhanmātaṉamutalāka tām veṇṭukovukku nicatam nāl kāṇam taṇṭam Aṭṭuvomāka kuṭuttom
Digital edition of SII 22.293 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
